MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances for Wednesday, Sept-06-2006: Arnold Walter Evje, Edq. appears for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.; Limited Scope Attorney Eric L. Lifschitz, Esq. appearing for Defendant Donald Harper, who is also present this day.

Settlement Conference held; the case settles; the Defendant Donald Harper and both counsel sign Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation--see scanned document. D206 trial date of Sep-11-2006 is removed.

Pro Tem Judge Barbara Anscher; not reported; Clerk Marjorie Manzella (D218/206).
